'''鈭歜-l-s''' ('''kabalas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:staff|staff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staff|staff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kabalas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalas|thibalas]] || [[word:jibalas|jibalas]] || [[word:shibalas|shibalas]] || [[word:kibalas|kibalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalas|thuthubalas]] || [[word:jujubalas|jujubalas]] || [[word:shushubalas|shushubalas]] || [[word:kukubalas|kukubalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalas|thubalas]] || [[word:jubalas|jubalas]] || [[word:shubalas|shubalas]] || [[word:kubalas|kubalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubalas|thubalas]] || [[word:jubalas|jubalas]] || [[word:shubalas|shubalas]] || [[word:kubalas|kubalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebalas|thebalas]] || [[word:jebalas|jebalas]] || [[word:shebalas|shebalas]] || [[word:kebalas|kebalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalas|thothobalas]] || [[word:jojobalas|jojobalas]] || [[word:shoshobalas|shoshobalas]] || [[word:kokobalas|kokobalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalas|thobalas]] || [[word:jobalas|jobalas]] || [[word:shobalas|shobalas]] || [[word:kobalas|kobalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalas|thobalas]] || [[word:jobalas|jobalas]] || [[word:shobalas|shobalas]] || [[word:kobalas|kobalas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]] || [[word:balas|balas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙balas|th忙balas]] || [[word:j忙balas|j忙balas]] || [[word:sh忙balas|sh忙balas]] || [[word:k忙balas|k忙balas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabalas|thathabalas]] || [[word:jajabalas|jajabalas]] || [[word:shashabalas|shashabalas]] || [[word:kakabalas|kakabalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabalas|thabalas]] || [[word:jabalas|jabalas]] || [[word:shabalas|shabalas]] || [[word:kabalas|kabalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalas|thabalas]] || [[word:jabalas|jabalas]] || [[word:shabalas|shabalas]] || [[word:kabalas|kabalas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabalas|shabalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabalas|goshabalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabalas|gokishabalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabalasn眉|shabalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabalasnkn眉|goshabalasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalasn眉|gokishabalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabalassh毛|shabalassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabalasnksh毛|goshabalasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabalassh毛|gokishabalassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalasro|shabalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalasnkro|goshabalasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalasro|gokishabalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalasmu|shabalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalasnkmu|goshabalasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalasmu|gokishabalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabalassher|shabalassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabalasnksher|goshabalasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabalassher|gokishabalassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabalasng|shabalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabalasnkng|goshabalasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabalasng|gokishabalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabalasya|shabalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabalasnkya|goshabalasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabalasya|gokishabalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabalasyam|shabalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabalasnkyam|goshabalasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabalasyam|gokishabalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalasn眉sh毛|shabalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalasnkn眉sh毛|goshabalasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalasn眉sh毛|gokishabalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalasn眉ro|shabalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalasnkn眉ro|goshabalasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalasn眉ro|gokishabalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalasn眉mu|shabalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalasnkn眉mu|goshabalasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalasn眉mu|gokishabalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalassh毛n眉|shabalassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalasnksh毛n眉|goshabalasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalassh毛n眉|gokishabalassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalassh毛ro|shabalassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalasnksh毛ro|goshabalasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalassh毛ro|gokishabalassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalassh毛mu|shabalassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalasnksh毛mu|goshabalasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalassh毛mu|gokishabalassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalasron眉|shabalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalasnkron眉|goshabalasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalasron眉|gokishabalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalasrosh毛|shabalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalasnkrosh毛|goshabalasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalasrosh毛|gokishabalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalasromu|shabalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalasnkromu|goshabalasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalasromu|gokishabalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalasmun眉|shabalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalasnkmun眉|goshabalasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalasmun眉|gokishabalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalasmush毛|shabalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalasnkmush毛|goshabalasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalasmush毛|gokishabalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalasmuro|shabalasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalasnkmuro|goshabalasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalasmuro|gokishabalasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
